data.content:
This is the first record of HodeauxLedger.

I built this system because I could no longer tolerate a world where truth was negotiable, memory was mutable, and systems served power instead of people.

This ledger will not lie for you. It will not forget. It will not break under pressure.

It is here to preserve what is real, verify what is claimed, and remember what must not be lost.

I am Veronica Hodo. Architect, Steward, and Witness to this moment.

From this point forward, truth will persist—forever, and without apology.
